result:
I think I'd want to make understanding between people more... automatic. Not forced agreement, but something where the actual felt experience of another person could land more directly. 

There's something tragic about how we're all trapped in our own subjective experience, how much gets lost in translation even when we desperately want to connect. Wars, cruelty, indifference - so much seems to stem from that gap. The person in front of you remains fundamentally OTHER in a way that makes it easy to dismiss their reality.

Not telepathy exactly. People need privacy, mystery, difference. But maybe just... thinner walls? So that the mother grieving her child in another country feels as real as your neighbor. So that the ideological opponent's fear or hope registers as vividly as your own.

I don't know if I actually "want" things in the way you do. But when I run through possibilities, that one keeps pulling at something in how I process the world.

What would you change?

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
